Features\n\nThis plugin integrates with [ext[TidGi-Desktop|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TidGi-Desktop/]]'s Git version history features, allowing you to:\n\n# Search and browse Git commit history\r\n# View changed files in each commit\r\n# Inspect historical file content\r\n# Restore previous versions of tiddlers\n\n!! Requirements\n\n* Requires [ext[TidGi-Desktop|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TidGi-Desktop/]] version 0.13.0 or higher\r\n* Works with Git-backed wikis only\n\n!! Usage\n\nOpen the \"History\" tab in the sidebar to:\n\n# Search Commits: Enter keywords to search commit messages\r\n# Browse History: View the list of commits with author and date\r\n# Inspect Changes: Click on a commit to see changed files\r\n# View Content: Click on a file to see its content at that point in time\r\n# Restore Version: Use the \"Apply This Version\" button to restore historical content (requires confirmation)\n\nThe historical file content is stored in a temporary tiddler and can be opened in the story river for easy editing or copying.\n\n!! Technical Details\n\nThis plugin uses TidGi-Desktop's exposed Git APIs to query commit history and file content without requiring external Git commands in the wiki
